summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing after backend refactoring (monolithic server.py split into modules). All 37 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed - navigation, login, PrezziPage with source toggles, Storico, and Referral pages all working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/health: Returns healthy status with timestamp
✅ GET /api/: Returns API info (Shopply API v2.7.0)
✅ POST /api/auth/login: Login with valid credentials returns token
✅ GET /api/auth/me: Returns current user info (requires auth)
✅ POST /api/auth/forgot-password: Returns success message with demo_token
✅ GET /api/copertura: Returns coverage data for Lombardia+Sicilia
✅ GET /api/prodotti: Returns products with correct structure
✅ GET /api/prodotti/offerte: Returns offers grouped by store
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: Fuzzy matching with quantity suffixes (1L, 500g, 250g)
✅ POST /api/ottimizza: Location filtering returns correct region stores
✅ GET /api/famiglia: Returns family info or null
✅ Frontend: Login page loads with email/password fields
✅ Frontend: Login successful - dashboard shows 'Ciao, Fuzzy Test!'
✅ Frontend: Navigation menu shows all items (Home, Offerte, Prezzi, Referral, Storico, Impostazioni)
✅ Frontend: PrezziPage shows source toggles (DoveConviene, Pepesto API, Cross-Ref)
✅ Frontend: PrezziPage shows 'Aggiorna Tutti i Prezzi (3 fonti)' button
✅ Frontend: Storico page shows search history with fuzzy-matched products
✅ Frontend: Referral page shows referral code and points system
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful - all 37 endpoints working identically to before
Code is now well-organized into modules: database.py, models.py, dependencies.py, routes/*.py
No regressions detected from the monolithic to modular architecture change
seed_data_creation: Using existing seed data (33 supermarkets, ~7000 products across 12 categories)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py (1860 lines) to modular architecture is complete and verified. All endpoints work identically. Test user: fuzzy@test.com / Test1234!. DB has 33 stores (Lombardia + Sicilia), 12 categories, ~7000 products. Fuzzy matching in /api/ottimizza strips quantity suffixes. Multi-source scraping has 3 sources: doveconviene (working), pepesto (requires API key), cross_reference.
